content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 27, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 27 focused on advancing the seamless-provision MVP for cloud agents, enhancing macOS desktop computer-use capabilities, and cleaning up cloud-related UI components. Significant progress was made in streamlining the agent handoff process and improving authentication flows.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Cloud Infrastructure & Provisioning**
*   Implemented a flag-gated tier flip for the app, allowing users to request a SHARED cloud agent on first-run ([#9838](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9838)).
*   Removed redundant cloud-ui components, including in-dashboard quick-chat and orphaned image-generation tools, to streamline the interface ([#9835](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9835), [#9834](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9834)).
*   Updated cloud URL canonicalization and documentation to ensure consistency across tests and API base paths ([#9832](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9832)).

**Computer Use & Core Enhancements**
*   Achieved full input coverage for macOS desktop CUA by repairing window listing and resolving critical macOS-specific bugs ([#9820](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9820)).
*   Updated `CharacterInput` to correctly allow `TemplateType` (functions) for template definitions ([#9839](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9839)).
*   Completed Steward OAuth login by enabling the reading of exchange codes from URL fragments ([#9831](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9831)).

**Registry & Ecosystem**
*   Added a third-party community registry entry for `plugin-x402-endpoints`, providing access to 28 official global data endpoints ([#9837](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9837)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Cloud & Handoff Logic:** A series of PRs were opened to finalize the agent handoff flow, including message queuing during switches ([#9844](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9844)), silent re-pointing ([#9845](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9845)), and bridge deletion ([#9846](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9846)). Additional cloud fixes address provisioning, env-var enforcement, and connector settings ([#9859](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9859), [#9858](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9858), [#9860](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9860)).
*   **Codex & Optimization:** Several PRs focus on simplifying the desktop dev environment, fixing build cycles, and optimizing runtime imports ([#9848](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9848), [#9850](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9850), [#9851](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9851)).
*   **UI/UX Improvements:** PRs opened to fix mobile touch targets, label cloud inputs, and resolve macOS traffic-light overlaps ([#9840](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9840), [#9841](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9841), [#9852](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9852)).

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   *No issues were explicitly closed in the provided data.*

## NEW ISSUES
*   *No new issues were opened in the provided data.*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *No active issues with more than 3 comments were reported.*
